commitStrategyReview.notes: Restructured into 7 atomic commit units. Each unit covers a single logical concern: token deletion, semantic stabilization, runtime publication, theme sections, component migration, docs, and plan metadata.

units.purpose: remove dead token files with zero remaining consumers

messagePreview.header: chore(tokens): delete legacy primitives and contract bridge
summary: remove legacy token bridge and primitives layer after confirming zero active consumers

units.purpose: add missing RGB channel exports and declare _semantic.scss as compatibility shim

messagePreview.header: refactor(tokens): stabilize semantic and system token layers
summary: declare semantic shim as compatibility layer for legacy token consumers
add missing RGB channel exports for secondary, surface, and whatsapp tokens
wrap error state tokens with CSS variable fallbacks

units.purpose: replace contracts bridge import with direct semantic imports and root declarations

messagePreview.header: refactor(styles): publish runtime tokens via semantic layer
summary: replace legacy bridge import with direct semantic module imports
define root-level CSS variables for spacing scale and neutral aliases

units.purpose: migrate hero and luxury-hacienda reveal theme sections off legacy token references

messagePreview.header: refactor(themes): migrate theme sections to system tokens
summary: replace primitive and base-neutral references with system color tokens
add stylelint-disable for art-directed luxury-hacienda decorative values

units.purpose: replace legacy base-gold and hardcoded references with semantic tokens across dashboard, home, and action components

messagePreview.header: refactor(styles): migrate components to semantic token refs
summary: replace legacy gold palette references with semantic emphasis and accent tokens
fix CSS variable fallback syntax in contact channel-icon-wrapper

units.purpose: document the runtime token publication contract after legacy layer removal

summary: record semantic directory as canonical runtime source and shim as temporary layer
document removal of legacy bridge and primitives layer
add decorative-exception governance rule for art-directed section themes

units.purpose: synchronize plan manifest, commit-map, and changelog with current implementation state

messagePreview.header: chore(plan): sync Plan 008 metadata with implementation
summary: update commit-map with atomic unit boundaries and corrected manifest lifecycle status
